Name: Malice, Domina of the Dead
Functional Text:
**Action** - {r}, {t}: Until end of turn, you may play target zombie from your graveyard. **Go again**

Whenever a zombie you control dies, banish it face-down and create a Corrupted Corpse in your banished Zone.

Name: Vox Necropolis
Functional Text:
During your action phase, zombies you've played from a graveyard or banished zone enter the arena tapped and get "When this enteres the arena, **attack** with it."

Zombies you control get "**Action** - {r}, {t}: **Attack**"

Name: Corrupted Crown
Functional Text:
When this defends, you may banish a card from your hand. If you do, this gets +1{d}.

**Blade Break**

Name: Undead Grasp
Functional Text:
**Action** - {r}, discard a zombie, destroy this: Your next zombie attack this turn gets +3{p} and "When this hits, destroy this zombie." **Go again**

**Battleworn**

Name: Mage Master Boots
Functional Text: **Action** - {r}, destroy this: The next non-attack action card you play this turn gets **go again**. **Go again**

Name: Dig for Souls
Functional Text:
Look at the top X cards of your deck. You may put a zombie from among them into your graveyard, then put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

Your next zombie attack this turn gets +4{p} and "When this hits, destroy this zombie."

**Go again**
